reviews.review_description: I wish I could give this 3.5 stars. That seems pretty fair, though I did come in with low expectations. Surprisingly good depth in the 3d and shooting the ogres is strangely satisfying. Something about the way they crumple to the ground after getting shot, but maybe that's just me. Yeah, if this developer comes out with any games in the future, I'll check it out.
Cool game, cant  wait for the next levels.
Good game, i haven't pass the first level but still it's quiet enjoyable

Good 3d graphic and hand made dolls, but it has not any menu for saving levels, thus if you want to play first level again, you will lost next levels those you achieved. I think it needs some upgrading by its developers.

Thank you dear developers.
